title: Item creation and copying in multiple boards
excerpt: We have an automation that creates a duplicate item in another board once an item is created (think an open project item creating matching billing item). But when an item is MOVED into that board, it doesn’t duplicate in…

posts.author: debrawest (Debra West)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have an automation that creates a duplicate item in another board once an item is created (think an open project item creating matching billing item). But when an item is MOVED into that board, it doesn’t duplicate in the 2nd board.

How to get an item to be duplicated across 2 boards?

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @debrawest - this does not trigger the automation as a move is not considered an item creation (I know I know…I’ve been there). Luckily - monday recently released a new automation to handle movement of items to boards

image697×253 10.1 KB

Looks like this came just in time!
Mark
